---
title: "Faadil Mustun"
subtitle: "Researcher"
---

::: {.profile-header}
::: {.profile-text}
I am a researcher working at the intersection of [your field] and [your methods].
My work focuses on [one-sentence summary of your research agenda].

[Add 2–3 sentences about your current position, affiliations, and what motivates your work.]
:::

::: {.profile-links}
[GitHub](https://github.com/faadilmustun){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::

## News

- **2026** — [Brief update: paper accepted, new role, grant, etc.]
- **2025** — [Another milestone]

## Selected work

See [Publications](publications.qmd) for the full list. Highlights:

- **[Paper title]** — *Venue, Year*. [Preprint](https://example.com) · [Code](https://github.com)
- **[Paper title]** — *Venue, Year*. [DOI](https://doi.org)

## Affiliations

- **[Institution / Lab]** — [Role, dates]
- **[Previous affiliation]** — [Role, dates]
